task_description: Wave 0/1 Foundation: Wire QuantSync and QuantAds with all missing Next.js API routes and AppShell integration, plus shared-ui client directive fixes.

verification.summary: All quality gates pass: typecheck (17 tasks), tests (195 tests across both apps + api-client), and build (both apps compile successfully). Semantic review issues addressed: shared proxy utility with error handling, timeout, conditional auth header; 9 missing routes added; all 54+ routes refactored to use shared utility.
